selected_tasks.body_preview: Close the #1 diagnostic gap in the harness: api_key_present:false crashes produce no diagnostic stash. Move state recording init before the API key check and wire stash_diagnostic_error into the missing-key path so that `state why last-failure` and the crash reporter actually capture the reason for the most common failure mode. Why this matters: State eviden
selected_tasks.title: Wire crash reporter into API key check and move state init earlier

selected_tasks.body_preview: Fix the recurring "grep: unmatched ( or \\(" error that appears 3× in the CI trajectory feedback. This is a harness noise issue — the evolution pipeline's grep calls use literal parentheses in patterns without proper escaping, causing spurious error output that pollutes CI logs and may cause grep to silently fail on some pattern matches. Why this matters: Th
selected_tasks.title: Fix recurring grep escape errors in evolve.sh

selected_tasks.body_preview: Surface the harness's dominant failure mode (api_key_present:false) as a tracked health metric in the evolution dashboard. Currently the dashboard health score (0.9219) doesn't distinguish between "sessions that attempted work and failed" vs. "sessions that never started because the API key was missing." This makes the dashboard blind to infrastructure failu
selected_tasks.title: Add api_key_present health metric to evolution dashboard
